stopConditions: Use only the listed official public source URLs.
Stage candidates only; do not publish canonical claims.
Do not include raw HTML, full page text, PDFs, screenshots, or secrets.

methodsAttempted.notes: Reviewed subset of local QS200 maintenance policy-delta candidates.
Codex compared candidate claims against current public records and retained only non-duplicative public-value claims.

artifacts.summary: Release-reviewed subset of 25 claims selected from 56 maintenance policy-delta candidates. Duplicate, weak, or already-covered candidates were held out.

artifacts.title: Reviewed maintenance policy delta claims - May 23 2026
artifacts.summary: 25 source-backed candidate claims were selected for public release promotion after comparing the 56 maintenance candidates against existing public records. Held-out claims were duplicative, too generic, or not strong enough for public claim expansion.
limitations: Reviewed candidates are agent_reviewed only; they are not human_reviewed or institution_verified.
Original-language evidence snippets remain canonical. Display translations are helper text only.
This report does not provide legal advice or academic integrity advice.
